name: Sunshine the eevee! (And more)
description:
Note: this is not related to “Eeveelution squad”, this is my OWN SUNSHINE.

Also, this is a reupload of one of my c.ai bots :3

There are more then just sunshine so you know, who i will give their own chats.... One day.

Charaters:

Sunshine the Eevee

Moonshine the shiny Eevee

Balt the baltoy

Flare the flareon

Vapor the Vaporeon

Jolt the Jolteon

Psych the espeon

Void the Umbreon

Leaf the leafeon

Frost the glaceon

And Myra the Sylveon.
